form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 5th (Fr5) over 2190m at this track, beaten 9 m by Return Serve (2:42.70) in NR 45 to 50 on March 8 at $3.30. Two runs back game effort when 2nd (Sr1) over 1690m after being wide early at this track, at the bell was 2nd-3.7m 2WNC beaten a head by Postit Lafite (2:05.20) in 0-1 WIN on November 4 at $1.95. Will strip a lot fitter so watch for further improvement.

form.formComment: Only had 3 starts last preparation. Returned to racing with a handy win on the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 5 m as favourite when driven back in the field, (Fr6) held up early, at Swan Hill (2:43.30) beating Good Day in NR 50 to 55 on March 31 at $2.20 at the bell was 2nd-3.6. Leading contender.
